description_long: This bungalow features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, one larger and one smaller, both with dark gray flat roofs and light-colored exterior walls. Large glass windows with greenish tints are visible along the longer facade, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property includes a spacious patio area and two distinct blue swimming pools, one adjacent to each building volume. The layout is open and expansive, with paved walkways and a clear separation between the living and recreational spaces. The overall appearance is sleek and luxurious, suitable for upscale urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, two blue swimming pools, and a spacious patio. The design is minimalist and luxurious, featuring clean lines and open spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main building, large pool, and patio area with prominent glass windows and flat roofs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the main structure, the smaller building, and the large pool in the foreground.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying both building volumes, the secondary pool, and the open patio layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the smaller building, the main pool, and the paved area.
